message:
fix: improve proxy passthrough for RFC 7230 compliance

- Filter hop-by-hop headers (Connection, Keep-Alive, Transfer-Encoding, etc.)
- Also filter custom hop-by-hop headers listed in Connection header
- Disable automatic compression to preserve original encoding
- Enable HTTP/2 for upstream connections
- Remove timeouts to support long-running LLM streaming responses

These changes improve proxy fidelity for passthrough mode, ensuring
requests are forwarded with minimal modification.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
